title: Bean Rounders Session zero
readAloud:
Welcome everyone to the very first adventure with the Bean Rounders. We are a family separated by hundreds of miles, using Dungeons & Dragons, a few webcams, and probably some questionable decisions to come together and create a story.

From the Cornish south west coast, to Yorkshires north east coast, this is our virtual table. Different ages, different experience levels, and very different approaches to problem solving. Some of us know D&D, some are learning, but every great adventurer starts somewhere.

Dungeons & Dragons is a game powered by imagination. The Game Master builds the world, describes the dangers, and controls everything our heroes encounter. The players choose their path, and the dice decide their fate.

There are no scripts (Other than my Intros), no rehearsals, and no guarantees that a carefully planned adventure survives first contact with the Bean Rounders.

There will be heroic moments.

There will be ridiculous moments.

There will definitely be bad ideas.

Our first campaign takes us to the Forgotten Realms, a legendary fantasy world filled with magic, monsters, lost civilisations, ancient secrets, and places most sensible people avoid.

Naturally...

that's exactly where we're going.

Before we create our heroes and begin the adventure, let's meet the family behind the characters.
